content.title: Full-Process AI Creative Collaboration
content.subtitle: Screenwriter, Director, Art Director, Storyboarder... multiple AI Agents work in harmony, collaborating to complete the entire creation process from script to screen.

agentCards.strategyLeadDesc: Coordinates ideas, tasks, and team rhythm across the set
agentCards.scriptwriterDesc: Auto-builds schedules, priorities, and execution checklists
agentCards.storyboardDirectorDesc: Turns creative intent into structured, production-ready prompts
agentCards.voiceoverArtistDesc: Transforms scripts into shot plans and storyboard structure
agentCards.videoEditorDesc: Aligns pacing, subtitles, and delivery quality before release
agentCards.growthMarketerDesc: Exports, publishes, and tracks performance after wrap

agent.title: AI Assistant
agent.empty: How can I help you today?
agent.emptyHint: Tell me what you need — script analysis, character design, storyboard planning, or any creative question.
agent.inputPlaceholder: Type a message, press Enter to send...
agent.enterToSend: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
agent.draftWhileGenerating: Reply in progress. You can keep drafting the next message.
agent.sendBlockedUploading: Attachments are still uploading. Send will be available when they finish.
agent.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
agent.archiveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to archive?
agent.loadMessagesFailed: Failed to load messages. Please try again.
agent.messageSyncError: Message sync failed. Refresh to retry.
agent.cancelCascadedAsks: Cancelled {count} pending question(s) along with the generation.
agent.staleGenerationHint: No response from the server for a while. The task may still be running.
agent.sessionGeneratingHint: This session is still thinking. You can keep drafting or switch to another session.
agent.sessionContinuesInBackground: Switched sessions. The previous reply will keep running in the background.

quickInput.scriptParseMsg: Please quickly parse the overall structure, theme, and core conflicts of this script
quickInput.episodeParseMsg: Please analyze the plot development, character arcs, and dramatic tension of the current episode
quickInput.characterAnalysisMsg: Please analyze the main characters in the script, including personality traits, motivations, and relationships
quickInput.sceneOptimizeMsg: Please help optimize the current scene description to make it more visual and dramatic
quickInput.dialoguePolishMsg: Please help polish the dialogue to make it more natural and in character
quickInput.creativeSuggestionMsg: Please give me some creative suggestions and improvement directions based on the current script
